title: Far Blue Mountains
description: (!Early test phase!) My 3rd biggest and most important annual modpack, aiming for forever worlds, immersion and immaculate build creativity. For the friends, the fam, and the fans. RPG Exploration beyond the Far Blue Mountains.
body:
Adventurous RPG modpack with a huge variety of blocks to build with, terrain to conquer and explore in a multitude of ways. Level up over time with skill trees and armors. Gone are the days of easy teleportation and back are the use for horses, boats/sail boats, working mailboxes, and the need to make trails and roads (you'll often find village connect by road/trail already! finish the trail add two signs and you'll be able to teleport between signs!)(temporarily disabled village roads). No cheative easy maps to locate structures. Instead immerse yourself with Antique Atlas compatible with a collection of Beautiful landscape generation mods to lose yourself in for hours.

Credits! <3

https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/human-era-villagers-illagers

https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/flamboyant-flowers-the-new-3d-flowers/
